history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Hello! Welcome to McDonald's. How can I assist you today? I have Our World Famous Fries available.

history.speaker: client
history.text: Hi, I'm here for a hearty meal today. Do you have any recommendations? I'm lactose intolerant so can't have dairy.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Hello! I have Chicken McNuggets available for a hearty meal. They contain gluten (as per our allergen data). Would you like to order these?

history.speaker: client
history.text: I'm lactose intolerant so can't have dairy. I'll take the Chicken McNuggets—do you have a side or drink to make this hearty?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Okay, your Chicken McNuggets are confirmed. We don't have sides or drinks available right now—what type of food would you like to order?

history.speaker: client
history.text: I need a hearty main item—do you have any other food options available?

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: I'm sorry, but we only have Chicken McNuggets available as a hearty main right now. They contain gluten (as per our allergen data). Would you like to proceed with these?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Yes, I'll take the Chicken McNuggets. I'm lactose intolerant so can't have dairy.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Your order: Chicken McNuggets® (gluten-containing). Is this correct?

history.speaker: client
history.text: Yes, this is correct. I'm lactose intolerant so I can't have dairy—this should be hearty enough.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: Your order is confirmed: Chicken McNuggets® (gluten-containing, no dairy). This should be hearty for you. Thank you for your order!

history.speaker: client
history.text: Thanks for the quick help—this should be hearty enough for me.

history.speaker: cashier
history.text: You're welcome! This should be hearty for you without dairy. Have a great day!

history.speaker: client
history.text: Thanks for making it quick—this should be hearty enough for me.
